title: Among Us Zombies
description: Turns zombies into colorful Among Us crewmates!
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/kAqhVL9.png)

This resource pack changes zombie's texture and turns them into Among Us characters with random colors. Optifine or CIT Resewn Mod recommended.

# ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/864ce2673dbec994be802758ed89ea19ef14ce15.png)
